speaker: speaker2
text: Nothing much — the same old stuff . A lot of bad news as usual .

speaker: speaker1
text: Well , what ’ s the weather report ?

speaker: speaker2
text: Sunny and mild today , cloudy and rainy tomorrow .

speaker: speaker1
text: Did they find those bank robbers ?

speaker: speaker2
text: Not yet . They were holding two men in Ohio , but they let them go . They weren ’ t the criminals after all .

speaker: speaker1
text: What about the sports page ? What were the scores of last night ’ s games ?

speaker: speaker2
text: Here ’ s the paper ; you can read them yourself .
